description:
Inspect and refactor client-server synchronization to eliminate latency and state discrepancies:
- Address stale client-side overwrites where mutation responses overwrite updated subscription states.
- Evaluate pushing fully updated aim/phase payloads in WebSocket events instead of triggering client-side query round-trips.
- Investigate parallelizing server-side file listing to speed up full-project loads.
- Explore sequence numbers/versions for resource atoms to prevent out-of-order updates.

status.comment: Created task for refactoring sync communication.
